title: epipactis lutea
intro: Epipactis lutea, also known as the yellow helleborine, is a species of orchid that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as lowering blood sugar levels and improving cardiovascular health, due to its flavonoid and alkaloid content. Epipactis lutea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal and health benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
